headline: Pearson Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Pearson (NYSE:PSO) reported a “good start to 2026,” posting 4% revenue growth in its first-quarter trading update, as management reiterated confidence in achieving full-year guidance and reconfirmed its medium-term outlook.
